name: Flat Beveled Curb Chain 4mm
description: Classic flat beveled curb chain in solid gold. A timeless everyday piece with clean lines and a comfortable flat profile that sits flush against the skin.

name: Diamond Cut Rope Chain
description: Diamond-cut rope chain with brilliant light-catching facets. The twisted rope pattern creates an elegant, eye-catching texture.

name: Solid Textured Oval Link
description: Textured oval link chain with a unique artisanal feel. Each link features delicate surface texture for added visual interest.

name: Solid Box Link Chain
description: Sleek solid box link chain — clean, modern, and lightweight. Perfect for pendants or worn on its own as a delicate statement piece.

name: Diamond Cut Wheat Link Chain
description: Delicate diamond-cut wheat link chain with a silky drape. The interlocking twisted links create a beautiful woven texture.

name: Solid Franco Link Chain
description: Solid franco link chain — a squared V-shaped link that's incredibly strong and drapes beautifully. Italian-inspired craftsmanship.

name: Hollow Fancy Round Link Chain
description: Two-tone hollow round link chain with alternating yellow and white gold links. A statement piece that combines classic elegance with modern flair.

name: Mini Paperclip Chain
description: Trending mini paperclip chain in solid gold. Elongated oval links create a modern, minimalist look that's perfect for layering.
